channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk
channel.description: 自动生成的Twitter RSS - 最后更新: 2026-04-25 13:09 UTC | 来源实例: https://xcancel.com

item.title: @elonmusk: The ADL classifies a shitload of stuff as “right wing extremism” and almost nothing as “left wing ex...
item.description: The ADL classifies a shitload of stuff as “right wing extremism” and almost nothing as “left wing extremism”. That is the heart of the problem. If white people killing black people, which is rare per capita, is classified as “right wing”, then, logically, blacks killing whites should be “left wing”, but they don’t count that at all! The ADL pushes extreme anti-white propaganda, therefore they are a hate group. Plain and simple.

item.title: @elonmusk: To me, one of the main lessons from SpaceX is that companies can continue to experience startup-like...
item.description: To me, one of the main lessons from SpaceX is that companies can continue to experience startup-like rates of progress as long as their founder doesn’t lose any of their intensity over a quarter of a century.

item.title: @elonmusk: If the leftwing masterminds were half as smart as they think they are, they would realise that the c...
item.description: If the leftwing masterminds were half as smart as they think they are, they would realise that the collapse of the West they’re working towards will cause their collapse too. If.

item.title: @elonmusk: The NAACP are buddies with SPLC. Both of them stoke hatred relentlessly.
item.description: The NAACP are buddies with SPLC. Both of them stoke hatred relentlessly.

item.title: @elonmusk: It’s interesting that the Southern Poverty Law Centre gave money to the KKK. What I also find intere...
item.description: It’s interesting that the Southern Poverty Law Centre gave money to the KKK. What I also find interesting is that the KKK accepted it. All collectivists together, eh?

item.title: @elonmusk: The fact that I wasn’t funded by the SPLC proves I’m not a Nazi
item.description: The fact that I wasn’t funded by the SPLC proves I’m not a Nazi

item.title: @elonmusk: But without racism, who will fund the Southern Poverty Law Center (and all the other thousands of fa...
item.description: But without racism, who will fund the Southern Poverty Law Center (and all the other thousands of far-left non-profits)?

item.title: @elonmusk: Incentives explain outcomes. Actually eliminating hatred would end the existence of “anti-hate” grou...
item.description: Incentives explain outcomes. Actually eliminating hatred would end the existence of “anti-hate” groups, so groups like SPLC amplified hatred instead to get more donations.

item.title: @elonmusk: SPLC got better returns than Nancy Pelosi and inverse Cramer combined!
item.description: SPLC got better returns than Nancy Pelosi and inverse Cramer combined!

item.title: @elonmusk: I recently awarded Britain the coveted title of Stage 5 Suicidal Empath. A just award.
item.description: I recently awarded Britain the coveted title of Stage 5 Suicidal Empath. A just award.

item.title: @elonmusk: We need Nuremberg trials for the monsters that enabled this.
item.description: We need Nuremberg trials for the monsters that enabled this.

item.title: @elonmusk: grok imagine is on another level now. the new model is unreal. go try it.
item.description: grok imagine is on another level now. the new model is unreal. go try it.

item.title: @elonmusk: Whoah, self-driving cars compete with airlines. I never considered that till now.
item.description: Whoah, self-driving cars compete with airlines. I never considered that till now.

item.title: @elonmusk: New Grok Imagine model just dropped with much better lip sync & sound. Nothing in this video is real...
item.description: New Grok Imagine model just dropped with much better lip sync & sound. Nothing in this video is real.
